global.description: The ad features a prominent sale announcement with a clear promotional message and a call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting a fast food delivery service with a sale.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Center decorative element
elements.description: A small, circular decorative element positioned in the center of the ad.

elements.label: Center decorative element
elements.description: A narrow, elongated decorative element located in the center bottom of the ad.

elements.label: Promotional message
elements.description: A bold, eye-catching text that reads 'Fast food, fast Free delivery over $15' in a prominent position.
elements.text_content: Fast food, fast Free delivery over $15

elements.label: Sale announcement
elements.description: A large, attention-grabbing headline that states 'QuickFork SALE' at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A rounded button with the text 'Learn more' at the bottom of the ad, inviting user interaction.
